summary: Google Maps Admin Panel integration testing - All requested features verified working with live Google Maps API key

minor.issue: Returns 400 for AT country codes - may not be fully configured for all countries

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed isAdminPathDisabled function to handle query parameters - was causing Google Maps Ayarları link to show 'Yakında' badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps API integration is working with real key. Postal lookup works for DE and CH. AT returns 400/fallback - may need configuration.

verified_features.sidebar_google_maps_link: PASS - 'Google Maps Ayarları' link visible in sidebar under SISTEM section, navigates to /admin/system-settings?focus=google-maps
verified_features.google_maps_card_visibility: PASS - Google Maps card visible on System Settings page
verified_features.key_status_display: PASS - Shows 'Key Tanımlı' when key is configured with masked key display
verified_features.clear_key_button: PASS - 'Key'i Temizle' button visible, enabled, and clickable
verified_features.postal_lookup_real_mode: PASS - Returns mode='real' for DE/CH postal codes
verified_features.street_list: PASS - Returns street suggestions for postal codes
verified_features.place_details: PASS - Returns place details with coordinates

api_test_results.postal_lookup_ch: PASS - mode=real for Swiss postal codes
api_test_results.place_details: PASS - Returns full address with lat/lng
